params.name: control_instruction
params.label: Voice/Emotion Instruction
params.default: A young girl with a soft, sweet voice. Speaks slowly with a melancholic, slightly tsundere tone.
params.description: Describe the voice style, emotion, or character

params.name: reference_wav_path_input
params.label: Reference Audio (for voice cloning)
params.description: Upload a reference audio file for voice cloning

params.name: use_prompt_text
params.label: Use Prompt Text
params.description: Enable to use text prompt instead of audio reference

params.name: prompt_text_input
params.label: Prompt Text
params.description: Text description of the voice (used when Use Prompt Text is enabled)

params.name: cfg_value_input
params.label: CFG Value
params.description: Classifier-free guidance scale (higher = more strict adherence to prompt)

params.name: denoise
params.label: Denoise
params.description: Apply denoising to the output audio

voicePresets.name: Soft Female
voicePresets.instruction: A young girl with a soft, sweet voice. Speaks slowly with a melancholic, slightly tsundere tone.

voicePresets.name: Confident Male
voicePresets.instruction: A mature male voice with confidence and authority. Speaks clearly and steadily.

voicePresets.name: Elderly Female
voicePresets.instruction: An elderly woman with a gentle, warm voice. Speaks slowly with wisdom.

voicePresets.name: Child
voicePresets.instruction: A young child with an energetic, playful voice. Speaks quickly with excitement.

voicePresets.name: Narrator
voicePresets.instruction: A professional narrator with a neutral, clear voice. Speaks at a moderate pace.
